vocab.example: My literature teacher was a fountain of knowledge, always able to quote obscure poets off the top of his head.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/thấm nhuần tinh thần kỷ luật
vocab.example: While he was strict, he managed to instil a sense of discipline in us that has been invaluable in my adult life.

vocab.meaning: làm chủ không gian/lớp học (bằng sự lôi cuốn)
vocab.example: She had this incredible ability to command the room the moment she stepped in, without ever raising her voice.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tài năng cá nhân
vocab.example: What made her stand out was how she would nurture individual talent rather than forcing everyone into the same mold.

vocab.meaning: phương pháp học thuật khắt khe/nghiêm túc
vocab.example: I admired my chemistry teacher for his rigorous academic approach, which pushed us to achieve our full potential.

vocab.meaning: đóng vai trò là người cố vấn/người dẫn dắt
vocab.example: Beyond the curriculum, he would often act as a mentor, offering life advice that stayed with me for years.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy niềm đam mê suốt đời
vocab.example: It was his unconventional teaching style that truly ignited a lifelong passion for social sciences in me.

vocab.meaning: sự kiên nhẫn cực độ (như một vị thánh)
vocab.example: Dealing with rowdy teenagers isn't easy, but my art teacher had the patience of a saint.

vocab.meaning: khai mở tiềm năng của tôi
vocab.example: I was a struggling student until her encouragement finally unlocked my potential in creative writing.

vocab.meaning: vượt ra ngoài khuôn khổ giảng dạy học thuật
vocab.example: The bond we shared went beyond academic instruction; she genuinely cared about our emotional well-being.
